name: Standard Ambush — Maximum First-Strike Damage
goal: Eliminate the highest-threat enemy in Round 1 and cripple the rest through surprise and control. Near-zero damage taken.
conditions_required: Party has surprise (enemies haven't detected anyone)
Raistlin has loaded Ring of Spell Storing with Invisibility (2nd) + Bless (1st) during long rest
Ala activates Invisibility and moves to position before surprise round
Bron has a clear 30ft straight path to charge lane

setup_before_combat.raistlin: Cast Mage Armor (1 Staff charge, AC 21). Load Ring of Spell Storing via 2nd-level Invisibility slot for Ala.
setup_before_combat.sweeney: Cast Aid (+5 max HP to Dain, Bron, Honu) if a long rest or quiet period preceded combat. Cast Bless to load into Ring if Dain's slot is needed for Smites.
setup_before_combat.ala: Activate Invisibility from Ring (bonus action). Move unseen to flanking/rear position on priority target. Ready Venom Fang in off-hand.
setup_before_combat.dain: Stealth approach (+10). Divine Sense within 60ft to tag undead/fiends before engaging.
setup_before_combat.honu: Stealth to chokepoint (+9). Position to protect Sweeney and Raistlin from melee reach.
setup_before_combat.bron: Stealth to staging position (+10). Mark clear 30ft charge path to priority target.

surprise_round.note: Surprised enemies do NOT act. Party gets one full round of free actions.

sequence.action: Attack priority target (boss or highest damage dealer) — Assassinate auto-crit on surprised target. Rapier +2: +9 hit, crit = 4d8+7+4d6 sneak avg 39.
sequence.bonus_action: Venom Fang +2 off-hand crit: 4d4+2+4d10 poison avg 34. CON DC15 or full poison.
sequence.notes: Priority target is likely dead or at 25% HP or less. Choose the enemy that ends fights fastest if alive.

sequence.action: If grouped enemies remain: Web (20ft cube, DEX DC14 or restrained, concentration). If single priority target survived: Hold Person using Portent die (low roll) to guarantee WIS save fails.
sequence.notes: Restrained from Web = disadvantage on attacks, advantage on attacks against them. Stack Portent die use here on the most dangerous surviving enemy.

sequence.action: Guiding Bolt on secondary priority target: +7 hit, 4d6 radiant. On hit: next attacker has advantage against this target (Dain/Bron benefit immediately).
sequence.notes: Do not heal — no ally should be damaged yet. Guiding Bolt advantage is highest-ROI action in surprise round.

sequence.action: Vow of Enmity (bonus action, advantage all attacks vs secondary target for 1 min). Attack Blade of Drow Lord +9. On hit: Divine Smite 1st slot (+2d8 radiant, +3d8 vs undead/fiends).
sequence.bonus_action: Vow of Enmity first, then attack
sequence.expected_damage: With Guiding Bolt advantage already set: 1d8+9 + 2d8 radiant = avg 28. On crit: avg 40+.
sequence.notes: Secondary target now hit for ~28 from Dain on top of Ala's earlier Guiding Bolt setup.

sequence.action: Trip Attack on a grouped enemy (inside or near Web zone if Web was cast). Hit +1d8 extra, STR DC14 or prone.
sequence.notes: Webbed + prone = cannot stand (restrained means half speed, difficult terrain keeps them down). Stack control on a third enemy.

sequence.action: Charge (30ft straight toward Guiding Bolt target or prone target). Greatsword +3: +11 hit, 2d6+9 (reroll 1s/2s). Crit on 19-20 with advantage from Vow of Enmity target overlap.
sequence.expected_damage: avg 16-23 (normal-crit range). With advantage from Guiding Bolt: crit odds ~30%+.
sequence.notes: Guiding Bolt advantage + prone (if Honu tripped) = near-guaranteed hit and elevated crit chance.

round_1.note: Roll initiative. Full combat begins. Party acts in initiative order.
round_1.priority: Finish priority target if alive. Establish Bless. Spiritual Weapon goes down.
round_1.ala: Cunning Action: Hide (bonus action) before or after attack. If hidden, next attack = advantage + Sneak Attack. Rapier +9/1d8+7+2d6. Stay mobile — don't get surrounded.
round_1.sweeney: Cast Spiritual Weapon (2nd slot, bonus action each round = 1d8+5 force, no concentration). Action: Healing Word (bonus) if any ally was hit, otherwise Guiding Bolt or Crossbow +2 (+7/1d8+5). After Spiritual Weapon is up, it attacks every turn as bonus action.
round_1.dain: Cast Bless (concentration, +1d4 attacks and saves to Dain + Bron + Honu) — highest ROI sustained buff. OR if priority target still alive: continue Vow attacks + Smite to finish. Decision: alive boss = keep attacking; minions only = Bless.
round_1.raistlin: Maintain Web (concentration). Use main action: Toll the Dead cantrip (1d8/1d12 vs injured targets — free pressure). Archimedes Help action to give an ally advantage if familiar is positioned.
round_1.honu: Trip or Goading Attack to control enemy focus. Goading Attack WIS DC14 or disadvantage vs everyone but Honu — forces enemies off Sweeney/Raistlin.
round_1.bron: Attack with advantage (Bless +1d4, prone/Web target). Action Surge if priority target still alive at end of Bron's turn.

round_2_and_beyond.bless_active: +1d4 all attack rolls and saves (Dain/Bron/Honu). Spiritual Weapon adds 1d8+5 free damage each round.
round_2_and_beyond.ala: Hide each turn via Cunning Action. Sneak Attack from hidden = advantage every round. If Venom Fang poison is recharged next long rest, reserve for boss fights.
round_2_and_beyond.bron: Action Surge if not yet used. Charge again if repositioned and 30ft lane is clear.
round_2_and_beyond.honu: Goading Attack to protect squishies. Shell Defense if HP drops below 15 — AC 25 turns Honu near-invulnerable as a meatshield.
round_2_and_beyond.sweeney: Healing Word (bonus action) if any ally drops below 50% HP. Preserve action for Guiding Bolt or Crossbow damage. Stay within 10ft of party for Cloak aura (+1 AC, death save advantage).
round_2_and_beyond.raistlin: If Web concentration breaks: cast Faerie Fire (advantage for whole party on all targets in 60ft cube) — doesn't require concentration to maintain benefit each turn. Misty Step to escape if targeted.
round_2_and_beyond.dain: Lay on Hands (20 HP pool) if ally drops to 0 HP. Continue Blade of Drow Lord attacks under Bless.

expected_outcomes.surprise_round: Priority target: ~73 avg damage (likely dead). Secondary target: ~28+ avg.
expected_outcomes.round_1: 2-3 enemies controlled (Web restrained or prone). Bless active. Spiritual Weapon online.
expected_outcomes.end_state: Boss dead in Round 0-1. Minions controlled, killed Round 2. Party exits with minimal damage.

deviations.no_surprise: Raistlin opens with Faerie Fire (advantage for whole party, 60ft cube, no concentration). Ala uses Cunning Action: Hide Round 1 to regain Sneak Attack advantage. Dain leads with Bless instead of Vow of Enmity.
deviations.boss_has_legendary_resistance: Use a low Portent die to force resistance burn before Ala attacks. Burn legendary resistance on Web or Hold Person first — then Ala's assassination is unblockable.
deviations.boss_is_undead_or_fiend: Dain: Abjure Enemy (frighten + speed 0, undead/fiends have disadvantage on save). Divine Smite = +3d8 radiant vs undead/fiends. Honu: use Goading Attack so undead/fiend targets Honu, not squishies.
deviations.enemies_spread_out: Drop Web, open with Faerie Fire instead (advantage for whole party across 60ft cube, hits spread enemies). Ala still assassinates priority target. Bron charges furthest threat.
deviations.ala_detected_before_combat: Ala uses Potion of Invisibility (bonus action backup) if Ring load was not completed. Or fight without Assassinate — still +9/1d8+7+2d6 with flanking.
